Fees aie orpfte the afore (qear ares ate Tait aree site faferfeat & faare Ft shan) fafa, 2009, * fafraan 14 & feu faefefed ar yeartta Pea area, aT: “44 fafag. za fafacay A arreat h eq Safe, Hrs wes seve slat 2 at oerar fAote are aret fra TT" mh, travaé wa, faery sratfaart (are) [Ferrera -111/4/2T IT. /1 88/14] ara foot : qea ae ara. 323(a), feats 14-5-2000 F Hrean 4 aferghad ev 7 -- 1 of 2 -- FRI BL USTTA : STAT 19 NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st January, 2015 F.No, 1-MISC/V1/V/2007.-—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 61 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board Act, 2006 (19 of 2006), the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board hereby makes the following regulations to amend the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Procedure for development of ‘Technical Standards and Specifications including Safety Standards) Regulations, 2009, namely :-— 1. Short title and commencement. (1) These regulations may be called the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Procedure for development of Technical Standards and Specifications including Safety Standards) Amendment Regulations. 2014, namely:— (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. bor regulation 14 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Procedure for development of Technical Standards and Specitications including Safety Standards) Regulations, 2009, the following shall be substituted, namely :-— “14. Miscellaneous. Ifany question arises as to the interpretation of these regulations, the same shal] be decided by the Board.”. K. RAJESWARA RAO. OSDIR yKn. CR} Peary rie eee ivy ratTAD E.
